visual_base.visual_narrative_log: (1) A young woman with short dark hair, wearing a black and white patterned bucket hat, a black choker, and a white off-the-shoulder dress, stands in a brightly lit warehouse retail aisle. She is highly expressive, using wide hand gestures and pointing towards the shelves. The background is filled with industrial orange racking packed with various boxed beverage products. A large red and blue Costco logo is overlaid at the top of the frame. (2) The camera focuses on the woman as she holds a clear, square plastic bottle filled with a vibrant green liquid. The label clearly identifies the product as 'Natural Benefit' avocado pear juice. She smiles broadly while presenting the bottle to the camera. Behind her, rows of the same product are stacked in green and yellow cardboard boxes on the store shelves. (3) The scene transitions to a close-up shot of the warehouse shelves, showing several boxes of the avocado pear juice. Some boxes are partially empty, indicating high consumer demand. The lighting is consistent with bright, flat overhead warehouse fixtures. Small price tags are visible on the shelving edges, showing numerical values. (4) The setting shifts to a domestic indoor kitchen or dining area with a white marble-patterned table. Two women are present: the narrator from before, now wearing a navy beret, and another woman with long dark hair in a purple top. They are seated together, holding a large jug of AB Yogurt and glasses of a light green mixed drink with straws. The background features home decor and soft, warm interior lighting.
visual_base.text_narrative_log: (1) [Logo]: COSTCO WHOLESALE. [Variety]: 終於補貨. [Slogan]: 爆紅果汁是炸馬桶神器. [Subtitle]: 你知道是什麼東西買不到. (2) [Variety]: 現在終於補貨了嗎?. (3) [Slogan]: 酪梨雪梨汁. (4) [Subtitle]: 這個你知道我們跑了5趟吧. (5) [Subtitle]: 終於有了. (6) [Subtitle]: 195元而且還是單罐. (7) [Subtitle]: 因為通常都是兩兩一起賣. (8) [Subtitle]: 像這都是兩個兩個一起. (9) [Subtitle]: 所以單罐195. (10) [Subtitle]: 還被買爆. (11) [Subtitle]: 那麼厲害. (12) [Subtitle]: 我們回去試試看. (13) [Subtitle]: 今天剛補貨. (14) [Subtitle]: 已經銷售成這樣. (15) [Subtitle]: 瘋狂. (16) [Subtitle]: 喝了以後馬上回購的. [Variety]: 純在酪梨雪梨綜合果汁. (17) [Subtitle]: 單瓶的話1200ml. (18) [Subtitle]: 是195塊錢. (19) [Subtitle]: 教大家一個. [Variety]: 炸馬桶神器. (20) [Subtitle]: 就是搭配AB的無糖優酪乳. (21) [Subtitle]: 在AB這裡面有B菌. (22) [Subtitle]: B菌也會促進肚子蠕動. (23) [Subtitle]: 酪梨也是一個油脂很高. (24) [Subtitle]: 所以你的排順度就會. [Variety]: 非常的多. (25) [Subtitle]: 1:1完美搭配. (26) [Subtitle]: 你一定跑廁所. (27) [Subtitle]: 因為. (28) [Subtitle]: 我們都跑廁所了. (29) [Subtitle]: 絕對不要上班前. (30) [Subtitle]: 也不要上課前喝哦. (31) [Subtitle]: 不要出門前喝. (32) [Subtitle]: 在家慢慢喝. (33) [Subtitle]: 吃太飽就來喝一杯吧.

visual_human_presence.countingEvidence: 1 main female narrator in the warehouse; 2 females together in the kitchen scene.
visual_human_presence.mainCharacterDescription: A young woman with short black hair, wearing a patterned bucket hat or navy beret, a black choker, and a white dress.

visual_scene_and_style.backgroundDescribe: Industrial warehouse aisles with orange shelves and bulk boxed goods; transitions to a modern home kitchen with a marble table and plush decorations.

audio_base.audio_narrative_log: (1) High-arousal female vocal delivery, energetic and fast-paced, initiates the recording. A bright, upbeat pop track with acoustic guitar strumming and a steady electronic beat serves as the BGM. The narrator's pitch is high and varied, showing significant enthusiasm. (2) A subtle digital 'pop' sound effect triggers as the speaker highlights the product. The interplay between the fast vocal rate and the bouncy musical rhythm creates a sense of excitement and urgency. Minimal ambient room tone is present. (3) The female narrator continues with a clear, enunciated delivery. A 'whoosh' sound effect accompanies a visual cut. The BGM maintains a consistent major-mode tonality, reinforcing the positive emotional valence of the content. (4) As the scene shifts, a second female voice enters in a friendly, conversational tone. The two voices overlap slightly during a toast. Multiple 'ding' and 'sparkle' SFX are used as emphasis markers throughout the technical explanation of the health benefits. (5) The recording concludes with both female voices laughing and speaking simultaneously over the continuous, upbeat musical track. The overall audio design is dense with information and positive acoustic cues.

narrative_and_purpose.narrativeStructure: List-based: Hook -> Evidence/Product Showcase -> Solution/Recipe -> Result/Warning
narrative_and_purpose.mainPurpose: To promote a specific avocado pear juice found at Costco and provide a recipe for improving digestive health by mixing it with yogurt.

endorsement_analysis.endorsementCues: Detailed showcase of product brand, price, and specific usage benefits.

high_inference.freeDescribe: High-energy social media style review with significant text overlays and upbeat audio design typical of viral food trend content.
